title: SOA-Harness v1.0 Audit Tail Observability Response
description: Normative schema for the 200 OK response body of GET /audit/tail (Core §10.5.2). Reading is a pure query — no audit record is written for the read, no StreamEvent is emitted, no Runner-internal state is mutated.

this_hash.description: The this_hash of the most recent record in /audit/permissions.log, or the literal string "GENESIS" when the log is empty. Hex lowercase SHA-256 when not GENESIS.

record_count.description: Count of records in the hash chain from GENESIS to the tail inclusive. Zero when the log is empty.

last_record_timestamp.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of the most recent record. OMITTED (not null, not empty string) when the log is empty.

runner_version.description: Matches the soaHarnessVersion value in Agent Card. Carried for drift attribution.

generated_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp when the Runner computed this response. Under an injected test clock (§10.6.1 testability note) this reports the injected clock value.
